details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all core requirements. Top-a parameter correctly added to SamplingParams class with default 0.0 and validation range [0.0, 1.0]. Filtering logic properly implemented across multiple backends (model_executor/layers/sampler.py, v1/sample/logits_processor.py, v1/sample/tpu/sampler.py) - all correctly compute max probability, mask tokens below top_a * max_prob, and implicitly renormalize via -inf masking. Parameter is thoroughly threaded through intermediate data structures (sampling_metadata.py, protocol layers, TPU metadata). Documentation provided in docstrings. Code is syntactically valid and follows vLLM conventions. Minor stylistic inconsistency noted: _apply_top_a uses in-place unsqueeze_ while TPU version uses non-in-place unsqueeze, but this doesn't affect functionality since tensors aren't reused across calls. Comprehensive support for spec_decode compatibility checking also included.
